name: Wasp Queen

attacks.name: royal sting
attacks.tell: The Queen rises slightly and charges with a quick peck towards the player
attacks.howToAvoid: Block with strong shield or dodge; the speed is extreme, anticipate its lifting movement
attacks.notes: Massive damage if it connects. Unlike other wasps, its stinger does not break, it can repeat it consecutively

attacks.name: Rain of stingers
attacks.tell: It rises very high and violently shakes its abdomen, sending multiple stingers downwards.
attacks.howToAvoid: Running constantly; The projectiles fall like rain in different parts, try to open space between them
attacks.notes: Covers wide range, difficult to dodge everything. Each stinger causes damage and remains stuck in the ground

attacks.name: air frenzy
attacks.tell: Goes into rage when its health is low: its wings vibrate creating a continuous deafening sound
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A (global effect); stay calm and focus on blocking and counterattacking with precision
attacks.notes: As long as the frenzy lasts, all of his attacks become faster and almost without pauses. This is his most lethal state before dying

attacks.name: Summon reinforcements
attacks.tell: Emits a resonant hum from its chest
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A; we will have to deal with the summoned wasps
attacks.notes: She calls several worker wasps to defend her. These reinforcements continue to appear periodically until the Queen falls

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: The first health phase introduces the Wasp Queen’s hybrid fight: aerial pressure, stinger shots, and the first cycle of normal summons.
bossPhases.trigger: It begins as soon as you summon her with the Bee Bee Q Medley and she seals the arena exit.
newPatterns: A timed cycle runs in parallel through the whole fight: aerial phase, summon phase, grounded rest, and poison rain.

attacks.name: royal sting
attacks.tell: The Queen rises slightly and charges with a quick peck towards the player
attacks.howToAvoid: Block with strong shield or dodge; the speed is extreme, anticipate its lifting movement
attacks.notes: Massive damage if it connects. Unlike other wasps, its stinger does not break, it can repeat it consecutively

attacks.name: Stinger Shot
attacks.tell: She lines up her abdomen and fires a direct projectile from the air.
attacks.howToAvoid: Keep moving and do not heal in a straight line underneath her.
attacks.notes: This is the most consistent way she turns the aerial phase into real attrition.

attacks.name: Summon reinforcements
attacks.tell: Emits a resonant hum from its chest
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A; we will have to deal with the summoned wasps
attacks.notes: She calls several worker wasps to defend her. These reinforcements continue to appear periodically until the Queen falls

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.summary: The second health phase increases her resistance and hardens the add cycle: she now mixes normal wasps with at least one much more annoying drone.
bossPhases.trigger: She enters at around 75% health with a tougher summon cycle.
newPatterns: The poison-bomb rain stops being a nuisance and becomes a phase that can genuinely disorder the whole arena.

attacks.name: royal sting
attacks.tell: The Queen rises slightly and charges with a quick peck towards the player
attacks.howToAvoid: Block with strong shield or dodge; the speed is extreme, anticipate its lifting movement
attacks.notes: Massive damage if it connects. Unlike other wasps, its stinger does not break, it can repeat it consecutively

attacks.name: Poison Bomb Rain
attacks.tell: She rises up and drops multiple poison charges over the arena.
attacks.howToAvoid: Run decisively and leave space between yourself and the last explosions; stopping late is usually worse than committing.
attacks.notes: This is the part of the fight that punishes poor movement planning the most.

attacks.name: Rain of stingers
attacks.tell: It rises very high and violently shakes its abdomen, sending multiple stingers downwards.
attacks.howToAvoid: Running constantly; The projectiles fall like rain in different parts, try to open space between them
attacks.notes: Covers wide range, difficult to dodge everything. Each stinger causes damage and remains stuck in the ground

attacks.name: Summon reinforcements
attacks.tell: Emits a resonant hum from its chest
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A; we will have to deal with the summoned wasps
attacks.notes: She calls several worker wasps to defend her. These reinforcements continue to appear periodically until the Queen falls

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.summary: The last health phase is where the fight is truly won or lost: her resistance rises again, the attack volume barely gives you air, and the adds keep coming while you wait for the grounded opening.
bossPhases.trigger: She enters below 35% health with the most aggressive version of her rotation.
newPatterns: The grounded rest window remains the best damage opportunity, but reaching it cleanly is far harder now.
specialTraits: In this final stretch her resistances and the number of active attacks are clearly worse than at the start.

attacks.name: royal sting
attacks.tell: The Queen rises slightly and charges with a quick peck towards the player
attacks.howToAvoid: Block with strong shield or dodge; the speed is extreme, anticipate its lifting movement
attacks.notes: Massive damage if it connects. Unlike other wasps, its stinger does not break, it can repeat it consecutively

attacks.name: Rain of stingers
attacks.tell: It rises very high and violently shakes its abdomen, sending multiple stingers downwards.
attacks.howToAvoid: Running constantly; The projectiles fall like rain in different parts, try to open space between them
attacks.notes: Covers wide range, difficult to dodge everything. Each stinger causes damage and remains stuck in the ground

attacks.name: Grounded Rest Window
attacks.tell: The queen lands to recover for a few seconds and finally leaves a real punish window.
attacks.howToAvoid: Save resources for this moment; most of the meaningful damage in the fight is secured here.
attacks.notes: Chasing her in the air matters less than exploiting this exhaustion phase well.

attacks.name: Summon reinforcements
attacks.tell: Emits a resonant hum from its chest
attacks.howToAvoid: N/A; we will have to deal with the summoned wasps
attacks.notes: She calls several worker wasps to defend her. These reinforcements continue to appear periodically until the Queen falls

description: A hidden sky queen summoned with the Bee Bee Q Medley in the Brawny Boy Bin nest. Her fight uniquely runs timed behavior phases and damage phases in parallel.
behavior: It rotates through timed attack cycles: aerial pressure, wasp summons, a grounded vulnerability window, and a dedicated poison-bomb rain phase. On top of that, its resistances and attack volume worsen as its health drops.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile immediately and seals the arena exit with paper. The player must first read which timed phase the queen is in before deciding whether to chase her or punish a grounded opening.
interactionWithCreatures: It summons wasps and drones as minions. Normal summons always die in three hits, though sturdier variants appear in NG+.
strategy: Salty is the best offensive route. The real trick is exploiting the grounded rest phase: that is where the fight is truly won, while the aerial phases are more about survival and add control.
respawnInfo: Repeatable with a Bee Bee Q Medley in the wasp nest.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Sting: 70
Sting combo: 65
Charged sting: 135
Stinger shot: 85
Poison bomb: 115
Poison barrage: 15
Tired land: 80
